In a typical workflow, you ingest documents into a dataset, the system parses and cleans them, then chunks and indexes the content for search. At question time, RAGFlow retrieves the most relevant passages and sends them to the model as context. RAGFlow focuses on deep document understanding, so it can handle complex formats beyond plain text, such as PDFs with tables, images, and mixed layouts. It provides an end-to-end pipeline: data ingestion, retrieval, chat, and agent style orchestration.
